scripts.build: bun run build:main && bun run build:preload && bun run build:renderer
scripts.build:main: bun build src/main/electron.ts --target=node --format=esm --outfile dist/main/electron.js --external electron && mkdir -p dist/main/migrations && cp src/main/db/migrations/*.sql dist/main/migrations/
scripts.build:renderer: bun build src/renderer/index.ts --target=browser --outfile dist/renderer/index.js && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/index.html
scripts.package:mac: bun run build && bun run scripts/package-desktop.ts
